message:
feat(fsfs): add embedded-models feature for lite builds (#11)

Add an `embedded-models` Cargo feature to frankensearch-fsfs (default on)
that controls whether ML models (~570MB) are baked into the binary. When
disabled via `--no-default-features`, the resulting lite binary is ~15MB
and loads models from ~/.local/share/frankensearch/models/ at runtime.

Changes:
- frankensearch-embed: add lite_fallback module providing a no-op
  ensure_default_semantic_models() when bundled-default-models is off
- frankensearch-fsfs: add embedded-models feature gating the
  bundled-default-models dependency; emit helpful stderr guidance when
  models are missing in lite builds
- install.sh: add --lite flag (implies --from-source) with post-install
  download-models hint
- ci.yml: add cargo check for lite build in quality gate; add
  release-build-lite job producing fsfs-lite-* archives for releases

Default build (cargo build --release) is unchanged -- models baked in.
Lite build: cargo build --release --no-default-features -- no models.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -93,6 +93,9 @@ jobs:
       - name: cargo check
         run: cargo check --workspace --all-targets
 
+      - name: cargo check (fsfs lite -- no embedded models)
+        run: cargo check -p frankensearch-fsfs --no-default-features
+
       - name: cargo clippy
         run: cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
 
@@ -604,10 +607,144 @@ jobs:
           name: release-${{ matrix.target }}
           path: dist/*
 
+  release-build-lite:
+    name: Release build lite (${{ matrix.target }})
+    if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')
+    needs: quality
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    timeout-minutes: 30
+    permissions:
+      contents: read
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        include:
+          - os: ubuntu-latest
+            target: x86_64-unknown-linux-musl
+            build_tool: zigbuild
+          - os: ubuntu-latest
+            target: aarch64-unknown-linux-musl
+            build_tool: zigbuild
+          - os: macos-latest
+            target: x86_64-apple-darwin
+            build_tool: cargo
+          - os: macos-latest
+            target: aarch64-apple-darwin
+            build_tool: cargo
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install nightly toolchain
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+        with:
+          components: rustfmt, clippy
+
+      - name: Prepare path dependencies
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          deps_dir="$(cd "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/.." && pwd)"
+          asupersync_ref="15e6b6920fa0ad3e6d843ea55186eed754389ad2"
+          frankensqlite_ref="5c99eeb93d789c1309d5c46a540289369ff39535"
+          fast_cmaes_ref="17f633e2c24bdd0c358310949066e5922b9e17b5"
+
+          clone_or_update() {
+            local repo_url="$1"
+            local dest_path="$2"
+            local ref="$3"
+            if [[ -d "${dest_path}/.git" ]]; then
+              git -C "${dest_path}" fetch --depth 1 origin "${ref}"
+            else
+              git clone --no-checkout "${repo_url}" "${dest_path}"
+              git -C "${dest_path}" fetch --depth 1 origin "${ref}"
+            fi
+            git -C "${dest_path}" checkout --detach FETCH_HEAD
+          }
+
+          clone_or_update "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync.git" "${deps_dir}/asupersync" "${asupersync_ref}"
+          clone_or_update "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite.git" "${deps_dir}/frankensqlite" "${frankensqlite_ref}"
+          clone_or_update "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/fast_cmaes.git" "${deps_dir}/fast_cmaes" "${fast_cmaes_ref}"
+
+          find "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE" -name Cargo.toml -exec \
+            sed -i.bak -e "s|/data/projects/|${deps_dir}/|g" {} +
+          find "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE" -name '*.bak' -delete
+
+      - name: Cache cargo registry + target
+        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+        with:
+          shared-key: release-lite-${{ matrix.target }}-nightly
+          cache-targets: true
+
+      - name: Setup Zig (Linux cross-musl builds)
+        if: matrix.build_tool == 'zigbuild'
+        uses: goto-bus-stop/setup-zig@v2
+        with:
+          version: 0.12.0
+
+      - name: Install cargo-zigbuild (Linux cross-musl builds)
+        if: matrix.build_tool == 'zigbuild'
+        run: cargo install cargo-zigbuild --locked
+
+      - name: Add Rust target
+        run: rustup target add ${{ matrix.target }}
+
+      - name: Build fsfs-lite release binary (no embedded models)
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          target="${{ matrix.target }}"
+          if [[ "${{ matrix.build_tool }}" == "zigbuild" ]]; then
+            cargo zigbuild -p frankensearch-fsfs --release --target "${target}" --no-default-features
+          else
+            cargo build -p frankensearch-fsfs --release --target "${target}" --no-default-features
+          fi
+
+      - name: Package lite archive + checksum
+        shell: bash
+        env:
+          TAG_NAME: ${{ github.ref_name }}
+          TARGET_TRIPLE: ${{ matrix.target }}
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          binary_name="fsfs"
+          archive_extension="tar.xz"
+
+          binary_path="target/${TARGET_TRIPLE}/release/${binary_name}"
+          if [[ ! -f "${binary_path}" ]]; then
+            echo "Expected binary not found: ${binary_path}" >&2
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
+          if command -v llvm-strip >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+            llvm-strip "${binary_path}" || true
+          elif command -v strip >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+            strip "${binary_path}" || true
+          fi
+
+          version_bare="${TAG_NAME#v}"
+          archive_base="fsfs-lite-${version_bare}-${TARGET_TRIPLE}"
+          mkdir -p dist
+          cp "${binary_path}" "dist/${binary_name}"
+          tar -C dist -cJf "dist/${archive_base}.tar.xz" "${binary_name}"
+          archive_path="dist/${archive_base}.${archive_extension}"
+          if command -v sha256sum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+            sha256sum "${archive_path}" > "${archive_path}.sha256"
+          else
+            shasum -a 256 "${archive_path}" > "${archive_path}.sha256"
+          fi
+          rm -f "dist/${binary_name}"
+
+      - name: Upload lite release artifacts
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: release-lite-${{ matrix.target }}
+          path: dist/*
+
   release-publish:
     name: Publish GitHub Release
     if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')
-    needs: release-build
+    needs: [release-build, release-build-lite]
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 20
     permissions:

@@ -15,9 +15,17 @@
 #   --easy-mode        Auto-update PATH in shell rc files
 #   --verify           Run self-test after install
 #   --from-source      Build from source instead of downloading binary
+#   --lite             Build lite variant (no embedded models, ~15MB binary)
 #   --quiet            Suppress non-error output
 #   --no-gum           Disable gum formatting even if available
 #
+# Lite build:
+#   The default build embeds ML models (~570MB) for zero-config semantic search.
+#   Use --lite (with --from-source) for a much smaller binary (~15MB) that loads
+#   models from ~/.local/share/frankensearch/models/ at runtime.
+#   Download models after install with: fsfs download-models
+#   Equivalent to: cargo build --release -p frankensearch-fsfs --no-default-features
+#
 set -euo pipefail
 umask 022
 shopt -s lastpipe 2>/dev/null || true
@@ -32,6 +40,7 @@ EASY=0
 QUIET=0
 VERIFY=0
 FROM_SOURCE=0
+LITE=0
 CHECKSUM="${CHECKSUM:-}"
 CHECKSUM_URL="${CHECKSUM_URL:-}"
 ARTIFACT_URL="${ARTIFACT_URL:-}"
@@ -176,6 +185,8 @@ Options:
   --easy-mode        Auto-update PATH in shell rc files
   --verify           Run self-test after install
   --from-source      Build from source instead of downloading binary
+  --lite             Build lite variant without embedded models (~15MB vs ~570MB)
+                     Implies --from-source. Run 'fsfs download-models' after install.
   --quiet            Suppress non-error output
   --no-gum           Disable gum formatting even if available
 EOFU
@@ -192,6 +203,7 @@ while [ $# -gt 0 ]; do
     --checksum) CHECKSUM="$2"; shift 2;;
     --checksum-url) CHECKSUM_URL="$2"; shift 2;;
     --from-source) FROM_SOURCE=1; shift;;
+    --lite) LITE=1; FROM_SOURCE=1; shift;;
     --quiet|-q) QUIET=1; shift;;
     --no-gum) NO_GUM=1; shift;;
     -h|--help) usage; exit 0;;
@@ -364,7 +376,12 @@ if [ "$FROM_SOURCE" -eq 1 ]; then
   else
     git clone --depth 1 "https://github.com/${OWNER}/${REPO}.git" "$TMP/src"
   fi
-  (cd "$TMP/src" && cargo build --release -p frankensearch-fsfs)
+  if [ "$LITE" -eq 1 ]; then
+    info "Building lite variant (no embedded models)"
+    (cd "$TMP/src" && cargo build --release -p frankensearch-fsfs --no-default-features)
+  else
+    (cd "$TMP/src" && cargo build --release -p frankensearch-fsfs)
+  fi
   BIN="$TMP/src/target/release/${BINARY_NAME}"
   [ -x "$BIN" ] || { err "Build failed"; exit 1; }
   if [ "$SYSTEM" -eq 1 ]; then
@@ -381,6 +398,10 @@ if [ "$FROM_SOURCE" -eq 1 ]; then
     fi
     ok "Self-test complete: $SELF_TEST_OUTPUT"
   fi
+  if [ "$LITE" -eq 1 ]; then
+    info "Lite build: no ML models embedded. Download them with:"
+    info "  ${BINARY_NAME} download-models"
+  fi
   ok "Done. Binary at: $DEST/${BINARY_NAME}"
   exit 0
 fi
